title: Reports: Celtics re-sign Ron Harper Jr. to long-term extension

summary: The Brooklyn native will reportedly return to the New York Knicks on a multiyear contract.

summary: The Pistons add 3-point shooting by picking up Thunder swingman Isaiah Joe from the Thunder.

summary: The former BYU star was the Wizards' first No. 1 overall pick since John Wall in 2010.

summary: The progress of the duo is pivotal to the rebuilding process of a franchise that hasn’t gotten much production since 2013.

summary: The 24-year-old big man was a restricted free agent after scoring 11.7 points and grabbing 8 rebounds per game last season.

summary: The former All-Star point guard is reportedly headed to Minnesota for big man Naz Reid and future Draft picks.
